title: Poo Avizhum Pozhudhil Lyrics Enakkul Oruvan
stanzas:
poo avizhum pozhudhil
or aayiram kanaa
or kanavin vazhiyil
adhe nila..
paal sirippaal
oli poo thelithaal.

thegam megam
aagum or nilaiye.
megam koodum
neram poo mazhaiye.

en moochu kuzhalile
un paadal thavazhuthe
undaana isaiyile
ul nenjam nanaiyuthe(2)

vaan veli meedhe
venmathi thondrum.
aanveli melae
aval udhithaale.

kaalam neram
meerum or nilaiye.
dhegam thorum
thoovum poo mazhaiye

poo avizhum pozhudhil
or aayiram kanaa
or kanavin vazhiyil
adhe nila..
paal siripaal
oli poo thelithaal.

aagum or nilaiye.
megam koodum
neram poo mazhaiye.

en moochu kuzhalile

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Poo Avizhum Pozhudhil conveys a deep sense of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of romantic moments.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Enakkul Oruvan, this song highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and connection with love.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Pradeep Kumar and composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was the song released?

Poo Avizhum Pozhudhil was released on September 8, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poo Avizhum Pozhudhil, the protagonist experiences a profound sense of love and connection, beautifully portrayed through the lyrics and melody. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal moments in Enakkul Oruvan, evoking feelings of nostalgia and romance. With its soothing composition by Santhosh Narayanan, it captures the essence of longing and dreams. Pradeep Kumar's heartfelt rendition adds depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poo Avizhum Pozhudhil is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Pradeep Kumar's soulful voice and Santhosh Narayanan's enchanting composition, this song from the film Enakkul Oruvan resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of romance as the lyrics weave a beautiful tale of emotions and dreams.
stanzaMeanings: In the time when flowers bloom, there is a thousand dreams on the path of one dream, that same moon... when the milk smiles, the flower shines.
The state will become like a cloud. When the cloud gathers, it will rain flowers.
In my curly hair, your song is hidden, and in that music, my heart is immersed.
On the sky's surface, the coolness begins. When she rises above, it shines.
With a gentle touch, my fingers will dance. When the eyes close, dreams will flow.
Time will change, and the state will be like this. The body will be drenched in flower rain.
In the time when flowers bloom, there is a thousand dreams on the path of one dream, that same moon... when the milk smiles, the flower shines.
The state will become like a cloud. When the cloud gathers, it will rain flowers.
In my curly hair, your song is hidden, and in that music, my heart is immersed.
